title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Complexity Forensics
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare exact, approximate, randomized, and baseline candidates under one evidence model.
Connect proof obligations to executable invariants, oracle comparisons, and counterexamples.
Enforce time, memory, recursion, and output budgets under adversarial scale.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Review Defense correctness-and-cost proof for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Review Defense assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Solve a bounded debug instance with 5 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample.
